summary: Allsale full-stack MVP tested end-to-end. Backend: 24/24 pytest cases pass (health, register/login/me, products, categories, search, cart CRUD+totals+free-shipping, checkout session creation against Stripe, order isolation, webhook bad-signature). Frontend (Expo web preview, mobile 390x844): Welcome → Register → Home (9 products + search filtering 'saree' → 1) → Product detail → Add to cart (becomes 'Added to cart') → Cart (qty +/- works, free-shipping unlocked banner appears when subtotal>=NZD 100, dual-currency NZD/INR) → Checkout form (all fields) → Stripe popup opens with real test session URL → Categories tab (3 categories, taps into category detail with filtered products) → Account (shows name) → My orders → Sign out returns to Welcome. Login with bad creds shows 'Invalid email or password'. No deprecated Expo packages, no red-screen errors, no React Native component issues detected.
action_items: None blocking. Optional: complete a full Stripe paid flow via webhook simulation in a future iteration to validate cart-clear + order.status='paid' transition (currently only verified via code path; live Stripe paid event not exercised because preview env can't complete card flow).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 700-line module but cohesive for MVP — consider splitting into routers/{auth,products,cart,checkout,orders}.py once it grows further.
Uses FastAPI on_event('startup'/'shutdown') which is deprecated in favour of lifespan handlers. Functional but worth migrating before FastAPI 1.0.

JWT_SECRET falls back to secrets.token_urlsafe() if env missing — that would invalidate all tokens on restart. The .env does provide one so it is fine, but the fallback is risky in prod; recommend fail-fast.
compute_cart_totals applies shipping=0 when subtotal==0 OR subtotal>=100; clear and correct.
All routes use the /api prefix as required for ingress routing.
Mongo _id is excluded in every find() via projection — good.
Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL exclusively, testIDs are comprehensive on all interactive elements, all text wrapped in <Text>.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 9 products on startup (verified). Created multiple TEST_ users during pytest + UI runs; non-destructive to seed data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env (https://allsale-shop.preview.emergentagent.com). All backend routes require /api prefix. Auth: register users with unique TEST_<timestamp>@allsale.co.nz to avoid duplicate-email 400. Stripe test key sk_test_emergent returns real test checkout URLs; live payment cannot be completed in preview. The single console 401 on app load is the initial /api/auth/me call before token exists — expected and harmless.
